headline: Regula Helps Uber Build a Nationwide Driver Verification Network in Poland
summary: RESTON, Va., June 23, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Regula is helping Uber bring advanced driver verification technologies to more cities across Poland. By expanding the use of Regula’s document authentication solutions nationwide, Uber is strengthening fraud prevention and adding an extra layer of high-assurance identity checks that goes beyond standard industry practices. As part of the expanded partnership, Regula 7320 mobile document readers now support driver identity verification across Uber’s
